name: 20ct Christmas Mixed Snowflake Set Dark Blue/Light/Silver - Wondershop™
description:
Bring graceful charm to your Christmas tree with this 20-Count Christmas Mixed Snowflake Set from Wondershop™. This plastic ornament set includes 20 ornaments in assorted snowflake and round shapes in dark blue, light blue and silver hues for a festive touch. Each ornament has a shiny cap with a coordinating top loop for easy hanging, and the shatter-resistant construction is ideal for homes with pets or young kids.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
